name: GH_GuidConflictSolution
summary: Contains a list of all possible Assembly GUID conflict solutions

enum_values.name: Unset
enum_values.summary: Indicates there is no solution picked yet

enum_values.name: Replace
enum_values.summary: Replace the loaded proxy with the conflicting proxy

enum_values.name: ReplaceAll
enum_values.summary: Replace all loaded proxies with all conflicting proxies in the current assembly

enum_values.name: SkipAll
enum_values.summary: Skip all conflicting proxies in the current assembly
